steps.title: Find the requested example
steps.content: The student wants an example of a sky island. The notes identify the Los Ajos-La Madera Mountains as one of the sky islands in the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico.

steps.title: Avoid general definitions
steps.content: Choice A defines sky islands without giving a specific example. Choice B discusses the National Park Service's view of sky islands. Choice D gives a definition and quotation, but still not the example. The sentence naming the Los Ajos-La Madera Mountains directly accomplishes the goal. The answer is C.
